name: Rubicon — Pokrovsk axis
description: Synthetic eastern-Ukraine FOB with three adversary DF assets at tactical reach. Coordinates fictional. Designed to push the operator into amber within ~25 s of keying under DEMO MODE 10x, and into red within ~60 s, mirroring real Rubicon sensor-to-shooter cycles.

adversaries.note: Zhitel ground vehicle, ~8 km east — direct-LoS to operator
Borisoglebsk-2, ~14 km southeast — wide-band sweep capability
Leer-3 (Orlan-10) airborne goniometer, ~12 km northeast — fast time-to-fix
